center.name: 圣诞岛
center.summary: 圣诞岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括马来八色鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-winged pitta is regularly found in Brunei, Cambodia, China, India, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam, and has been found to be vagrant in Australia, Christmas Island, Taiwan and Hong Kong. Habitat is lowland subtropical and tropical forests. P
